mapper.select: /** UsptTaskPrtcmpnyInfoHistDao.selectMaxHist */ select a.* from ( select task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id , cnvn_change_req_id , confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id , partcptn_company_cnt , smlpz_cnt , mspz_cnt , etc_cnt ,row_number() over (order by created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_task_prtcmpny_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and( confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id is null or confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id = '') ) a where a.rn = 1

/** UsptTaskPrtcmpnyInfoHistDao.selectUsptTaskPrtcmpnyInfoHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_task_prtcmpny_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id is null or confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id ='') /*변경전정보는 제외*/ order by created_dt desc

/** UsptTaskPrtcmpnyInfoHistDao.selectUsptTaskPrtcmpnyInfoHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af , task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id , cnvn_change_req_id , confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id , partcptn_company_cnt , smlpz_cnt , mspz_cnt , etc_cnt ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_task_prtcmpny_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id is not null and confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af , task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id , cnvn_change_req_id , confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id , partcptn_company_cnt , smlpz_cnt , mspz_cnt , etc_cnt ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_task_prtcmpny_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id is null or confm_task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id = '') and to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
